title: praravinia negrosensis
intro: Praravinia negrosensis, also known as the Negros pravina, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Praravinia negrosensis typically involve the use of its leaves, roots, and bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
